text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening after training, I spot a group of
students heading back to the dorms.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excellent work, everyone.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Same goes for you! And that marks the end of
another busy week!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Keeping my eyes on the weekend prize is
how I blasted through training! I hope I can still
move tomorrow! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...Speaking of, do you all have anything planned?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: If you're free, I was wondering if we could—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAUGH!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huuuh?! Wh-what's wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh no, I just remembered! Hear me out! It's awful!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: I have some wonderful news to share with you all.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Earlier this week, Winning Ticket was awarded a
Model Citizen Award for saving an elementary
schooler from getting caught up in a traffic
accident.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Uwaaaagh! It was nothing! But thanks for the
mention!

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
However, there was a quiz on the day of the
awards ceremony, so you'll be coming in over the
weekend to make up for it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAAAAH! No waaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So, I've gotta take that quiz all by myself! I'm so
saaaad!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry to hear that... But at least you can take
the quiz with honor...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um... I actually have plans too...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Sis is dragging me out shopping for new cleats.
She keeps harping about how it's time I got them
replaced.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to a fan meet-and-greet event with
Fukukitaru and Bright...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And I've been tasked with the sacred mission to
teach the kids in the park how to do backflips.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, but I have Mejiro estate-related
business tomorrow that must be taken care of.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like you've all got things of your own to
do, huh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, there are some things that can
only be done during the weekend... Was there
something you wanted to do?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, nope! It's nothing, so don't worry about
it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I spy a familiar student standing by
the empty racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All righty! Time for a little break, and then one
more lap...
Spe? Is that you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Tickezo?! What are you doing here? I thought
you had a quiz...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yep, and now I can bask in sweet, SWEEEEET
freedom! Figured I'd blow off some steam by
doing a few laps!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wait... What's everyone doing here?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I finished with my errand, so I dropped by for a
run.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The kiddos know how to backflip like ninjas
thanks to my expert tutelage! My work is done!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I wrapped up shopping with Sis, so... Here I am.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So everyone completed their errands and made
their way here, I take it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Actually, I was going to ask you all
yesterday if you wanted to do some training
together!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What are the odds that we'd all end up in the
same place at the same time like this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, true. We did all have very different plans
for how to spend our day.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...But there is a common thread connecting us all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: We're all racing toward our dreams.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We cannot stand still and wait for our dreams to
come to us. We all know that, and so our coming
here wasn't so much by chance as it was an
inevitability.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow... Yeah! You're absolutely right!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as the gang's all here, why don't we have a
race?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, how does 2,400 meters sound? Same as
the Derby!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Wait. I came here to do hill sprints.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, too bad! We're all gathered here, which
means we have to race! Everyone, strap on your
pedometers! Whoever has the most steps after a
lap around the track gets bragging rights!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hwuuuh?! How're we gonna make up our minds if
we're all over the place?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Well, we may be bound by the common thread of
following our dreams... But it seems those dreams
can't be neatly woven together.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The teammates realize that although they all have
dreams, each one is personal—no two dreams are
alike.
